file.body:
Search Pesquisar
Search items, reagents, or recipes... Pesquisar itens, reagentes ou receitas...
Could not load item details. Please try again later. Não foi possível carregar os detalhes do item. Tente novamente mais tarde.

src/app/features/select-realm/select-realm.page.ts 78
Items Items
Unable to load items. Unable to load items.
Unable to load item details. Unable to load item details.
Unable to compare item with Blizzard API. Unable to compare item with Blizzard API.
Item request failed. Item request failed.
Unable to search recipes. Unable to search recipes.
English (US) or English (GB) name is required. English (US) or English (GB) name is required.
Item ID Item ID
Unnamed item Unnamed item
Name Name
Quality Quality
Class Class
Expansion Expansion
State State
Actions Actions
All override states All override states
Has override Has override
No override No override
All recipe states All recipe states
Has recipe Has recipe
No recipe No recipe
All expansions All expansions
All classes All classes
All subclasses All subclasses
Create manual item Create manual item
Compare Blizzard API Compare Blizzard API
Edit item override Edit item override
Associate recipe Associate recipe
Delete this item override? Base item data will be inherited again. Delete this item override? Base item data will be inherited again.
Class ID and subclass ID are required together. Class ID and subclass ID are required together.
Recipes Recipes
Unable to load recipes. Unable to load recipes.
Unable to load recipe details. Unable to load recipe details.
Unable to compare recipe with Blizzard API. Unable to compare recipe with Blizzard API.
Recipe request failed. Recipe request failed.
Recipe ID Recipe ID
Unnamed recipe Unnamed recipe
Name Name
Profession Profession
Outputs Outputs
Reagents Reagents
State State
Actions Actions
All override states All override states
Has override Has override
No override No override
Compare Blizzard API Compare Blizzard API
Edit recipe override Edit recipe override
Unable to save recipe override. Unable to save recipe override.
Close dialog Close dialog
Recipe overrides Recipe overrides
Search effective recipe rows and manage admin overrides that survive Blizzard sync. Search effective recipe rows and manage admin overrides that survive Blizzard sync.
Name Name
Search localized names Search localized names
Exact or partial recipe ID Exact or partial recipe ID
Crafted item ID Crafted item ID
Output item ID Output item ID
Override state Override state
Page size Page size
Apply Apply
Reset Reset
No recipes match the current filters. No recipes match the current filters.
Admin recipes Admin recipes
recipes recipes
Loading recipe details... Loading recipe details...
Comparing with Blizzard API... Comparing with Blizzard API...
Recipe Recipe
Field Field
Base Base
Override Override
API API
Effective Effective
No comparable fields returned. No comparable fields returned.
Run compare to inspect Blizzard API differences. Run compare to inspect Blizzard API differences.
Scalar overrides Scalar overrides
Crafted item ID Crafted item ID
Crafted quantity Crafted quantity
Rank Rank
Required skill level Required skill level
Override note Override note
Crafted outputs Crafted outputs
Add output Add output
Item ID Item ID
Quantity Quantity
Skill Skill
Remove Remove
No output overrides. The base crafted item is inherited. No output overrides. The base crafted item is inherited.
Reagents Reagents
Add reagent Add reagent
Item ID Item ID
Quantity Quantity
Sort order Sort order
No reagent overrides. Base reagents are inherited. No reagent overrides. Base reagents are inherited.
Rank alternatives (1–3) Rank alternatives (1–3)
Rank Rank
Item ID Item ID
Skill points Skill points
Save override Save override
Cancel Cancel
Edit recipe override Edit recipe override
Open the recipe override editor. Open the recipe override editor.
Compare Blizzard API Compare Blizzard API
Compare the local recipe data with the current Blizzard API response. Compare the local recipe data with the current Blizzard API response.
Delete override Delete override
Remove this recipe override and inherit base recipe data again. Remove this recipe override and inherit base recipe data again.
Override Override
Base Base
Delete this recipe override? Base recipe data will be inherited again. Delete this recipe override? Base recipe data will be inherited again.
Remove output {$INTERPOLATION} Remove output {$INTERPOLATION}
Remove reagent {$INTERPOLATION} Remove reagent {$INTERPOLATION}
Rank alternatives for reagent {$INTERPOLATION} Rank alternatives for reagent {$INTERPOLATION}
No items found Nenhum item encontrado
Search items by name or ID Pesquisar itens por nome ou ID
Associated item Item associado
Search crafted items or reagents Pesquisar itens criados ou reagentes
Class Classe
Subclass Subclasse
Expansion Expansão
Item association Associação de item
Crafted or reagent Criado ou reagente
Crafted output Resultado criado
Reagent Reagente
Rank Nível
Profession syncSincronização de profissões Start an asynchronous sync of professions, skill tiers, recipes, and reagents.Inicie uma sincronização assíncrona de profissões, níveis de habilidade, receitas e reagentes. Sync professions and recipesSincronizar profissões e receitas DismissFechar A profession sync is already running.Uma sincronização de profissões já está em execução. Unable to start the profession sync.Não foi possível iniciar a sincronização de profissões. Profession sync is running…A sincronização de profissões está em execução… Profession sync failedFalha na sincronização de profissões Profession sync completedSincronização de profissões concluída You can continue browsing recipes while it finishes.Você pode continuar navegando pelas receitas enquanto a sincronização termina. The profession sync could not be completed.Não foi possível concluir a sincronização de profissões. ProfessionsProfissões Skill tiersNíveis de habilidade RecipesReceitas ReagentsReagentes Recipe failuresFalhas de receitas Unable to monitor the admin job. You can try starting it again.Não foi possível monitorar a tarefa administrativa. Você pode tentar iniciá-la novamente. Crafting rules are unavailable; ranking is heuristic.Crafting rules are unavailable; ranking is heuristic. Best crafter: {$INTERPOLATION}.Best crafter: {$INTERPOLATION}. Heuristic best crafter: {$INTERPOLATION}. Crafting rules are unavailable.Heuristic best crafter: {$INTERPOLATION}. Crafting rules are unavailable. No matching character profile.No matching character profile. Profession profilesProfession profiles Configure your characters’ crafting skill trees.Configure your characters’ crafting skill trees. We find AuctionHelper.lua and AuctionHelper_Professions.lua, then ignore everything else. Replacing talent-tree definitions is destructiveReplacing talent-tree definitions is destructive This inspection only reports the available SavedVariables data. It does not import or replace shared talent-tree definitions.This inspection only reports the available SavedVariables data. It does not import or replace shared talent-tree definitions.
